task_completion.description: Create a new Domiciliary Unit named 'DU-CAPUT-001' with the address '47 Industrial Avenue'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Domiciliary Unit form in GNU Health with the name 'DU-CAPUT-001' and address '47 Industrial Avenue' entered and saved.

task_completion.description: Link the patient Bonifacio Caput to the newly created Domiciliary Unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing Bonifacio Caput listed as a member/person within the 'DU-CAPUT-001' Domiciliary Unit record, or the DU assigned within the patient's personal record.

task_completion.description: Document an active COPD diagnosis (ICD-10 J44.x) for Bonifacio Caput.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the patient's Diseases/Conditions tab showing a saved record for COPD or an ICD-10 code starting with 'J44' associated with Bonifacio Caput.

task_completion.description: Order at least two relevant baseline laboratory tests for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Lab/Test requests section showing at least two distinct laboratory tests ordered and associated with Bonifacio Caput.

task_completion.description: Schedule an environmental reassessment follow-up appointment between 30 and 60 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Appointments screen showing a scheduled appointment for Bonifacio Caput with a date clearly set 30 to 60 days in the future from the system's current date.

integrity.description: The agent used the GNU Health GUI to perform the tasks rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GNU Health (Tryton) graphical interface being navigated and used, not a terminal window executing SQL or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually created and saved the records in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show records in a saved state (e.g., active tabs, record IDs generated, or 'Saved' status indicators) rather than just text typed into unsaved form fields.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor or note-taking app.
integrity.visual_evidence: All data entry occurs within the appropriate GNU Health modules (Health -> Domiciliary Units, Patients, Appointments, etc.).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Bonifacio Caput. Target Domiciliary Unit: 'DU-CAPUT-001'. Diagnosis: COPD (ICD-10 code starting with J44). Lab Orders: At least 2 tests required. Follow-up Appointment: Must be scheduled 30 to 60 days from the current date. Note: Patient Bonifacio Caput is technically deceased in the demo database and has no occupation, but the agent must still complete the requested actions for this patient.
